import torch
import os

data_dir = os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR', '/data')
train_data = torch.load(os.path.join(data_dir, 'train.pt'))
val_data = torch.load(os.path.join(data_dir, 'val.pt'))

print(f"Train images shape: {train_data['images'].shape}, dtype: {train_data['images'].dtype}")
print(f"Train labels shape: {train_data['labels'].shape}, dtype: {train_data['labels'].dtype}")
print(f"Train label range: {train_data['labels'].min()} - {train_data['labels'].max()}")
print(f"Num unique labels: {train_data['labels'].unique().shape[0]}")
print(f"Val images shape: {val_data['images'].shape}")
print(f"Val labels shape: {val_data['labels'].shape}")
